summary: Equipment Management feature testing complete. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing successful - all components render correctly, modals work, PDF download works, navigation works.

issues: Welcome popup appears when navigating back to dashboard - minor UX issue but not blocking

backend_apis.GET /api/equipment: PASS - Returns equipment list with filters
backend_apis.POST /api/deployments: PASS - Creates deployment, marks equipment unavailable
backend_apis.GET /api/deployments/{id}: PASS - Returns deployment with equipment details

frontend_ui.Equipment Page Load: PASS - Page loads with stats, tabs, filters
frontend_ui.Stats Cards: PASS - Shows Total, Disponibles, En déplacement, Alertes
frontend_ui.Tabs Navigation: PASS - Inventaire, Déplacements, Alertes tabs work
frontend_ui.Add Equipment Modal: PASS - Opens with all form fields
frontend_ui.Deployments Tab: PASS - Shows deployment cards with PDF/Details buttons

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All main action buttons have data-testid attributes for testing
API uses proper authentication with Bearer token
Equipment availability is correctly managed when creating/deleting deployments
PDF generation uses ReportLab and returns proper content-type
seed_data_creation: Used existing Canon EOS R5 equipment and Mariage Martin deployment for testing. Created and cleaned up test equipment during pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Equipment management feature is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/equipment and /api/deployments work correctly. Frontend at /admin/equipment renders properly with all modals and tabs. PDF generation works. Authentication required for all endpoints (401 returned without token).
